instructions: Step 1: Locate the bet display next to the Spin button.
Step 2: Read the current bet value.
Step 3: Use the 'Bet +' or 'Bet -' button (per options.json positions) to step the bet until the display shows '1.00'.
Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '1.00' (the bet_sizes value 1 per spec.bet_mechanics.bet_sizes; tolerance ±1 ladder step).
